queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default probability associated with borrowers lacking a checking account.
Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers linked to extended loan duration in months and their contribution to default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk mitigation effects associated with maintaining a critical account or other existing credits on default probability.
